user.title: SMA Zero Export – Connect
user.description: Enter your SMA Sunny Portal credentials and select the energy price sensor that drives automatic control.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SMA Sunny Portal. Check your plant ID and network connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: A Zero Export controller for this plant is already configured.

data.manual_state: Manual state when automatic control is disabled

data_description.automatic_control: When disabled, the manual state below is applied to the SMA portal immediately and held until automatic control is re-enabled.
data_description.manual_state: The Zero Export state to apply when automatic control is disabled.
data_description.deadband: Price values between -deadband and +deadband are treated as zero (no change). Negative prices trigger Zero Export ON; positive prices trigger OFF.
data_description.min_toggle_interval: Minimum number of minutes between consecutive toggles of the Zero Export setting.
data_description.polling_interval: How often (in minutes) the integration reads the Zero Export state from the SMA portal. Only active in automatic mode.
data_description.energy_meter_sensor: A sensor that measures current grid feed-in power in watts. If grid feed-in exceeds the threshold while Zero Export is active, validation fails.
data_description.discrepancy_threshold: Maximum allowable grid feed-in (W) while Zero Export is active before validation is marked as failed.
data_description.notify_service: Enter the full service name, e.g. notify.mobile_app_myphone.
data_description.failsafe_timeout: If Zero Export stays ON for longer than this many minutes while the energy price is positive, the integration forces it OFF.
